title: 보험 상품 조회(종류별)
content:
SELECT INS.STD_GOODS_NO,
       PGB.GOODS_NO,
       PGB.GOODS_NM,
	   (SELECT CD_NM FROM ST_STD_CD WHERE GRP_CD = 'PD122' AND CD IN('01','02','03','04','06','07','31','32','33','34') AND PGB.TP_DTL_CD = CD) AS INSURE
  FROM PR_INSRNC_GOODS_REL_INFO INS, 
       PR_GOODS_BASE PGB
 WHERE 1=1
   AND INS.TGT_GOODS_NO = PGB.GOODS_NO
   AND PGB.SALE_STAT_CD = '01'
 ORDER BY INS.STD_GOODS_NO

title: 전시코너세트 조회
content:
SELECT /*+ LEADING(T3 T1 T2 T4) USE_NL(T1 T2 T4) */
  /*[MoProductMapper.xml][getGoodsDisplayCornerList][전시 코너 세트 조회]*/
  T1.CONR_NO AS conrNo
  , T1.CONR_NM AS conrNm
  , T3.SET_NO AS setNo
  , T3.SET_NM AS setNm
  , T3.SET_DESC_CONT AS setDescCont
  , T3.DISP_PRIO_RNK AS AA
  , T4.CONR_TGT_CD AS conrTgtCd
  , T4.DISP_PRIO_RNK AS dispPrioRnk
  , T4.CONTS_TIT_NM AS contsTitNm
  , T4.CONTS_PATH_NM AS contsPathNm
  , T4.CONTS_FILE_NM AS contsFileNm
  , T4.MOV_FRME_CD AS movFrmeCd
  , T4.LNK_URL_ADDR AS lnkUrlAddr
  , T4.ALT_CONT as altCont
FROM PR_CONR_SET_INFO T3
JOIN PR_CONR_BASE T1 ON T3.CONR_NO = T1.CONR_NO
JOIN PR_CONR_TGT_INFO T2 ON T3.CONR_NO = T2.CONR_NO AND T3.TGT_NO = T2.TGT_NO
JOIN PR_CONR_CONTS_INFO T4 ON T3.CONR_NO = T4.CONR_NO AND T3.SET_NO = T4.SET_NO
WHERE 1 = 1
  AND T1.USE_YN = 'Y'
  AND T3.DISP_YN = 'Y'
  AND T1.CONR_NO = '9277'
  AND SYSDATE BETWEEN T4.DISP_STRT_DTIME AND T4.DISP_END_DTIME
ORDER BY T3.DISP_PRIO_RNK, T3.SET_NO, T4.DISP_PRIO_RNK
